ℂґαςκє∂ 4/22/2025 12:52 PM

Mayur69sahu 4/22/2025 1:01 PM

ℂґαςκє∂ 4/22/2025 1:02 PM

1:09 PM
Remember we are new to this server. Some things you can prepare for yourself: we already have /team home. Save up xp already by killing blazes. Or you can fish at /lake for mending books which is rare and valuable. Get a abyss sword if possible, which is what you’ll use the mending book on as long as it doesnt have sharpness on it.

5:33 PM

5:33 PM
Butt u do not neeedddd….
5:34 PM
Shadow assassin or assassin at all unless u are able to get up close with ur enemies
5:35 PM
And thats about it
5:36 PM
Main enchants u need for a sword is rage 6, both soul enchants (i forget the name) Most heroic enchants and mending, Unbreaking 3, and a couple more
5:36 PM
With armour u need to not Stack Enchants that are not able to be stacked
5:37 PM
With the Valor enchant u cant stack the heroic version of it
5:37 PM
But u can deff stack the leg version, Making ur power greater then it was before
5:38 PM
And i suggest making an axe as well
5:38 PM
It would need to have similar enchants to the sword
5:38 PM
If you were to put this in ur offhand while pvp, You will gain a strength bonus
5:38 PM
Even better if u put another sword in ur hand
